calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2006 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-19-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Aug-15-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Yee.
Robert Resmer, Esq. for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, present by Gary Looney.
Defendants: Wyman J. Norris ind, dba Amante's and Charlotte Ann Mansaur, aka Charlotte Mansour ind, dba Amante's, are present in pro per.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows: Settlement in the total amount of $1,111.30 by check today to Mr. Looney, if and when the check is cleared, Plaintiff will file a dismissal.
Parties agreed to terms.
Matter is placed on the CRC-225 for dismissal in Dept. 212 on Aug. 15, 2006 at 10:00 A.M.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2006 Set For Trial On Jun-19-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-29-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
